name: Guacamole Con Tomatillos
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard the husks on the tomatillos and boil them until tender.
2. Combine the tomatillos and chiles in a blender and mix until smooth.
3. Halve the avocados and remove the seeds. Scoop out the pulp and mash it with a fork.
4. Add the mashed avocado, onion, salt, pepper, and cilantro to the blended tomatillos and chiles.
5. Mix everything together well.
6. Season with additional salt and pepper if desired.
7. Serve the guacamole topped with sprinkled cilantro.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups.
